canonical_definition: Plug-and-play zero-shot detection module that uses random token deletion and semantic difference measurement to identify AI-generated text.
papers: MUZO: Leveraging Multiple Queries and Momentum for Zeroth-Order Fine-Tuning of Large Language Models
